scripts.predev: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { const stdout = execSync('netstat -ano'); const line = stdout.toString().split('\n').find(l => l.includes(':5000') && l.includes('LISTENING')); if (line) { const pid = line.trim().split(/\s+/).pop(); if (pid && pid !== '0') { process.kill(pid, 'SIGKILL'); console.log('🌿 Predev: Released port 5000 (killed zombie PID ' + pid + ')'); } } } catch (e) {}"
